creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
After updating the ports tree to r509722 (including latest commit to the port in question), synth fails to build index on my system.

[/usr/home/dries]$ sudo synth just-build /root/portlist
Regenerating flavor index: this may take a while ...
Scanning entire ports tree.
 progress: 66.58%
culprit: print/harfbuzz-hb-view
  Scan aborted because 'make' encounted an error in the Makefile.
  print/harfbuzz-hb-view (return code = 1)
Flavor index generation failed: ports scan


CC: Latest committer.
